title: BCI Summary v1
description: Lossy, high-level BCI state derived from metrics envelope. Stable runtime API surface.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the BCI summary schema.

windowId.description: Logical window identifier within a session (e.g., rolling or fixed window UUID).

sessionId.description: Stable identifier for the BCI session, matching metrics envelope sessionId.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds indicating the end of the aggregation window.

stressScore.description: Continuous stress intensity in the range [0,1].

stressBand.description: Banded stress category derived from stressScore for runtime filtering.

attentionBand.description: Player attention state category derived from attention-related metrics.

visualOverloadIndex.description: Estimated visual processing overload in the range [0,1].

startleSpike.description: True if an acute startle response was detected within this window.

signalQuality.description: BCI signal reliability status for this window.

meta.description: Optional metadata describing derivation details for this summary.

derivationMethod.description: Implementation-defined description or identifier for the derivation pipeline.

confidenceScore.description: Overall confidence in this summary in the range [0,1].
